name: Angel Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Add confectioner's sugar and beat until well mixed.
4. Beat in vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add cake flour and ground nuts, mixing thoroughly.
6. Cover dough with wax paper and refrigerate for 15 minutes or until firm.
7. Divide dough into two halves and cut each half into 12 pieces.
8. Dust a sheet of wax paper lightly with flour.
9. Shape each cookie using the floured wax paper, forming rolls about 1 1/2 inches long and 1/2 inch in diameter.
10. Place cookies on ungreased baking sheets about 1 1/2 inches apart.
11. Bake in the middle of the oven for about 13 minutes or until pale golden around the edges.
12. Transfer to racks set over wax paper and dust with confectioner's sugar while still warm.
13. Allow cookies to cool completely before storing in airtight containers.
